mapper.select: select count(*) from evaluation_result where completion_status = '1'
select count(distinct student_id) from evaluation_result where risk_level in ('中', '高')
select count(*) from evaluation_result where risk_level = '高'
select count(*) from evaluation_result where risk_level = '低'
select count(*) from evaluation_result where risk_level = '中'
select count(*) from evaluation_result where coalesce(create_time, update_time) between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
select count(*) from evaluation_result where coalesce(create_time, update_time) between #{startDate} and #{endDate}

select DATE_FORMAT(coalesce(create_time, update_time), '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(*) as evaluationCount, sum(case when completion_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as completedCount, sum(case when risk_level = '高' then 1 else 0 end) as highRiskCount from evaluation_result where coalesce(create_time, update_time) between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by DATE_FORMAT(coalesce(create_time, update_time), '%Y-%m-%d') order by date asc

select er.result_id as resultId, s.name as studentName, q.title as questionnaireTitle, er.risk_level as riskLevel, er.create_time as createTime from evaluation_result er left join student_info s on er.student_id = s.student_id left join questionnaire q on er.questionnaire_id = q.questionnaire_id order by coalesce(er.create_time, er.update_time) desc limit #{limit}

select inot.notification_id as notificationId, s.name as studentName, q.title as questionnaireTitle, er.risk_level as riskLevel, inot.create_time as createTime from intervention_notification inot left join evaluation_result er on inot.result_id = er.result_id left join student_info s on er.student_id = s.student_id left join questionnaire q on er.questionnaire_id = q.questionnaire_id where inot.process_status = '0' order by inot.create_time desc limit #{limit}
